name: Swift Title Loans
description_short: Swift Title Loans Buena Park, California — Swift Title Loans offers car title loans in Memphis, TN from $100–$50,000, accepting bad credit and past bank...
description_long:
Swift Title Loans operates a single brick-and-mortar lending branch at 1473 S Trezevant St in Memphis, Tennessee. The company specializes in car title loans, a product where borrowers pledge their vehicle's title as collateral to secure cash quickly. Their marketing targets consumers who have struggled to access conventional credit, with explicit messaging that bad credit histories and past bankruptcies do not disqualify applicants.

The company offers title-secured loans ranging from $100 to $50,000, split into two tiers based on loan size. Applications can be submitted online, and Swift Title Loans promises same-day cash for approvals completed before noon. A key feature is that borrowers retain physical possession of their vehicle throughout the loan term — the lender holds the title, not the car. In-person service is available Monday through Friday, 9am to 7pm, and Saturday from 10am to 5pm. Their office is closed Sundays. Customers can also reach the company by phone at 1-888-903-0217 or by email at service@swiftloans.com.

Swift Title Loans differentiates itself through accessibility to high-risk borrowers. The explicit acceptance of past bankruptcies and poor credit scores removes barriers that eliminate most applicants from traditional lenders. The same-day funding promise addresses the urgency common to title loan borrowers. Customer reviews consistently name a staff member, Alfred, as the primary point of contact, crediting him with patient explanations of terms and hands-on help with paperwork. The office environment is described across multiple reviews as clean, welcoming, and professional.

However, this product carries serious risks that borrowers must understand. Pledging your vehicle title means defaulting on the loan could result in repossession — a potentially catastrophic outcome for borrowers who depend on their car for work. The website provides no APR disclosures, fee schedules, or representative loan cost examples, which is a significant transparency gap. Several customer reviews contain keyword-heavy language ('cloud-based personal loans,' 'regional finance personal loans') that reads as SEO-optimized content rather than authentic feedback, making it difficult to fully trust the review corpus. Title loans should be treated as a last resort for consumers with no other credit access and a concrete repayment plan in hand before borrowing.
address: 8302 La Palma Ave STE 301, Buena Park, CA 90620

company_info.headquarters: 8302 La Palma Ave STE 301, Buena Park, CA 90620

pros: Same-day funding available for applications approved before noon
Explicitly accepts bad credit and past bankruptcies — no minimum credit score barrier stated
Borrowers keep physical possession of their vehicle during the loan term
Wide loan range: $100 to $50,000 covers both small emergencies and larger needs
Extended weekday hours (9am–7pm) and Saturday availability (10am–5pm)
256-bit SSL and TLS security on online applications
In-person Memphis location with staff available for hands-on application help
cons: Vehicle title is pledged as collateral — default risks repossession of your car
No APR, interest rate, or fee information disclosed on the website
Single location only — no service outside Memphis, TN
Closed on Sundays, limiting access during weekend emergencies
Several customer reviews contain unusual keyword-stuffed language, raising questions about review authenticity
best_for: Memphis residents who own a paid-off vehicle and need emergency cash quickly
Borrowers with bad credit or past bankruptcies who have been rejected by conventional lenders
People who need same-day funding and have a clear short-term repayment plan
Those needing larger amounts than typical payday lenders offer, backed by vehicle equity
diagnosis: Swift Title Loans is best for Memphis-area consumers who own a vehicle with clear title and need emergency cash that they cannot access through conventional credit channels, including those with bankruptcy history. The critical caveat is that title loans put your vehicle at risk if you default, and the website discloses no APR or cost information — borrowers must request full loan terms in writing before signing anything.
services: In-person branch service in Memphis, TN
Vehicle-collateral loans with continued car possession during repayment
